testcase.name: Add Sport Wizard › Authenticated Access › should display the page title
Add Sport Wizard › Authenticated Access › should display footer navigation
Add Sport Wizard › API Mocked States › should show error state when profile API returns server error
Add Sport Wizard › API Mocked States › should render wizard shell even with empty sport data
API Mocking with MSW › Basic API Mocking › should use default mock data
API Mocking with MSW › Basic API Mocking › should mock profile API response
API Mocking with MSW › Custom Handlers › should override default handlers for specific scenarios
API Mocking with MSW › Custom Handlers › should mock specific endpoints
API Mocking with MSW › Error Scenarios › should handle server errors gracefully
API Mocking with MSW › Error Scenarios › should handle unauthorized errors
API Mocking with MSW › Error Scenarios › should handle rate limiting
API Mocking with MSW › Error Scenarios › should reset to default handlers
API Mocking with MSW › Conditional Responses › should mock based on request parameters
API Mocking with MSW › Conditional Responses › should mock based on request body
API Mocking with MSW › Network Timing › should handle slow network responses
API Mocking with MSW › Mock Data Integration › should verify mock user data in assertions
API Mocking with MSW › Mock Data Integration › should use mock data for UI verification
Forgot Password Page › Page Load › should display forgot password page correctly
Forgot Password Page › Page Load › should have back to login link
Forgot Password Page › Reset Request › should accept valid email for reset
Forgot Password Page › Reset Request › should show success message for existing email
Forgot Password Page › Reset Request › should not accept empty email
Forgot Password Page › Reset Request › should not accept invalid email format
Forgot Password Page › Navigation › should navigate back to login
Forgot Password Page › Navigation › should be accessible from login page
Forgot Password Page › Edge Cases › should handle rapid submissions gracefully
Forgot Password Page › Edge Cases › should trim whitespace from email
Login Debug › debug Firebase Auth login
Login Page › Page Load › should display login page with correct elements
Login Page › Page Load › should have correct page title
Login Page › Email Form › should show email form when clicking continue with email
Login Page › Email Form › should allow going back to social buttons
Login Page › Email Form › should have forgot password link in email form
Login Page › Successful Login › should login successfully with valid credentials
Login Page › Successful Login › should clear error message on successful retry
Login Page › Login Failures › should show error for invalid credentials
Login Page › Login Failures › should show error for empty email
Login Page › Login Failures › should show error for empty password
Login Page › Login Failures › Invalid Email Formats › should reject invalid email: invalid
Login Page › Login Failures › Invalid Email Formats › should reject invalid email: invalid@
Login Page › Login Failures › Invalid Email Formats › should reject invalid email: @example.com
Login Page › Navigation › should navigate to forgot password page
Login Page › Loading States › should show loading state during login
Login Page › Loading States › should disable form during submission
Social Login › should have Google sign in button
Social Login › should have Apple sign in button
Social Login › should open Google OAuth popup
Onboarding Flow › Page Load › should display onboarding page after login
Onboarding Flow › Page Load › should show continue button
Onboarding Flow › Profile Step › should display profile form elements
Onboarding Flow › Profile Step › should allow continuing with valid profile
Onboarding Flow › Profile Step › should advance to sport step after profile
Onboarding Flow › Sport Step › should advance to sport step after profile
Onboarding Flow › Gender Step › should allow continuing through steps
Onboarding Flow › Navigation › should allow navigating through onboarding
Onboarding Flow › Complete Flow › should navigate through onboarding steps
Onboarding Flow › Complete Flow › should persist progress if page is refreshed
Onboarding Mobile › should display correctly on mobile
Onboarding Mobile › should have touch-friendly button sizes
Signup Page › Page Load › should display signup page with correct elements
Signup Page › Page Load › should have correct page title
Signup Page › Page Load › should show mode switcher after email form opened
Signup Page › Form Validation › should not submit with empty form
Signup Page › Form Validation › should not submit with only email
Signup Page › Form Validation › should not submit with only password
Signup Page › Form Validation › Invalid Emails › should reject: invalid
Signup Page › Form Validation › Invalid Emails › should reject: invalid@
Signup Page › Form Validation › Weak Passwords › should warn about weak password: 12345
Signup Page › Form Validation › Weak Passwords › should warn about weak password: password
Signup Page › Form Validation › Weak Passwords › should warn about weak password: abc
Signup Page › Form Validation › Weak Passwords › should warn about weak password: 123456
Signup Page › Form Validation › Weak Passwords › should warn about weak password: qwerty
Signup Page › Form Validation › Weak Passwords › should warn about weak password: letmein
Signup Page › Successful Registration › should register new user with valid credentials
Signup Page › Successful Registration › should clear form errors on valid input
Signup Page › Registration Failures › should show error for existing email
Signup Page › Navigation › should have terms link after opening email form
Signup Page › Social Signup › should have Google signup button
Signup Page › Social Signup › should have Apple signup button
Signup Accessibility › should be keyboard navigable
Signup Accessibility › should have proper form labels
Connected Accounts — Firecrawl Flow › API Mocked Flow › should show loading overlay when starting a sign-in session
Connected Accounts — Firecrawl Flow › API Mocked Flow › should open the sign-in modal with an iframe after session starts
Connected Accounts — Firecrawl Flow › API Mocked Flow › should complete sign-in flow and show success toast
Connected Accounts — Firecrawl Flow › API Mocked Flow › should show warning toast when verification fails
Connected Accounts — Firecrawl Flow › API Mocked Flow › should show error toast when start session returns 500
Connected Accounts — Firecrawl Flow › API Mocked Flow › should show rate-limit warning when start session returns 429
Connected Accounts — Firecrawl Flow › API Mocked Flow › should cancel session when user closes the modal
Invite Page › Unauthenticated Access › should redirect unauthenticated users away from /invite
Invite Page › Authenticated Access › should display invite shell container
Invite Page › Authenticated Access › should display share channel grid
Invite Page › Authenticated Access › should display at least one share channel
Invite Page › Authenticated Access › should display QR section
Invite Page › Authenticated Access › should display stats card with sent and joined counts
Invite Page › Error State › should show error state on invite API failure
Invite Page › Loading State › should show loading skeleton initially
News / Pulse › Feed Display › should render the news feed with articles
News / Pulse › Empty State › should show empty state when API returns no articles
News / Pulse › Error State › should show error state when API returns server error
News / Pulse › Error State › should show retry button in error state
News / Pulse › Error State › should recover when retry succeeds after error
News / Pulse › Loading State › should show skeleton while loading
Settings Page › Unauthenticated Access › should redirect unauthenticated users away from /settings
Settings Page › Authenticated Access › should display settings page container
Settings Page › Authenticated Access › should have correct page title
Account Information Page › Unauthenticated Access › should not render account-info page without auth
Account Information Page › Authenticated Access › should display the account information page container
Account Information Page › Authenticated Access › should display email item
Account Information Page › Authenticated Access › should display change password item
Account Information Page › Authenticated Access › should display sign out item
Account Information Page › Authenticated Access › should display delete account item
Account Information Page › Authenticated Access › should show toast when change password is clicked with valid email
Account Information Page › Authenticated Access › should show confirmation sheet when sign out is clicked
Account Information Page › Authenticated Access › should show destructive confirmation sheet when delete account is clicked

Auth Pages Visual Regression › Login Page › login page - email form visible
Auth Pages Visual Regression › Login Page › login page - email validation error
Auth Pages Visual Regression › Login Page › login page - form filled

Auth Pages Visual Regression › Forgot Password Page › forgot password - email entered
Auth Pages Visual Regression › Forgot Password Page › forgot password - form elements
